name: Teach OpenWiki generation to author helpful BPMN

elements.name: Internal-generator intent recovered
elements.documentation: Resume the operator-settled outcome: OpenWiki internal generation authors useful BPMN alongside Markdown; the outer maintainer only invokes, verifies, and delivers.

elements.name: Confirm internal-agent extension seam
elements.documentation: Verify how qq-openwiki forwards caller input into the installed OpenWiki update and how the existing wrapper and tests preserve its run boundary.

elements.name: Build reliable wiki publish command
elements.documentation: Expose the locked pipeline as one internal-agent-friendly command that requires complete node and edge evidence, deterministic generation, the matching semantic BPMN, and the visibly attributed PNG without publishing intermediate SVG output.

elements.name: Teach generator when and how to diagram
elements.documentation: Have qq-openwiki supply stable guidance to the internal OpenWiki agent: choose BPMN only where it materially clarifies a process, author it with the Markdown, embed the PNG, maintain existing diagrams, and impose no prescribed diagram or quota while preserving caller instructions.

elements.name: Install and document generator tool
elements.documentation: Make the reusable publication command available to OpenWiki runs through the existing qq installer and document the internal generation contract at its source-owned surfaces.

elements.name: Verification entry
elements.documentation: Merge the initial implementation and all in-scope correction paths before re-running the complete focused verification sequence.

elements.name: Run pipeline, wrapper, and installer checks
elements.documentation: Exercise wiki publication, evidence refusal, deterministic output, message and option preservation, installation, existing wrapper invariants, and the rendering-enabled pipeline suite.

elements.name: Automated checks green?
elements.documentation: Only a mechanically verified capability advances to the real internal-agent smoke run.

elements.name: Fix in-scope check failures
elements.documentation: Correct the smallest causal implementation defect and return through the complete focused checks.

elements.name: Run real internal OpenWiki smoke test
elements.documentation: Run the installed OpenWiki internal generator against a disposable repository containing a diagram-worthy process; do not invoke the outer maintainer or directly author the generated wiki.

elements.name: Judge generated diagram usefulness
elements.documentation: Inspect whether the internal agent actually selected a worthwhile process, produced an accurate readable diagram, and used it to clarify rather than decorate or replace the Markdown narrative.

elements.name: Helpful BPMN generated?
elements.documentation: The capability succeeds only when a real diagram-worthy generation run produces useful embedded BPMN, not merely when prompt text and commands exist.

elements.name: Tune tool or generator guidance
elements.documentation: If the internal agent omits a warranted diagram or produces an unhelpful one, adjust only the tool or guidance responsible and repeat mechanical and behavioral verification.

elements.name: Run fresh-context review
elements.documentation: Give the exact locally verified Change to an independent read-only reviewer before commit or publication.

elements.name: Confirmed findings?
elements.documentation: The accountable agent verifies each reported failure path and changes only confirmed findings introduced within the agreed scope.

elements.name: Fix confirmed review findings
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest in-scope correction and return through focused checks, behavioral smoke, and exact-delta review.

elements.name: Open one source PR
elements.documentation: Commit and push the green reviewed generator capability and open one pull request carrying TASK-6 intent and Check evidence.

elements.name: PR green?
elements.documentation: The source Change is ready only when its applicable GitHub checks pass and the demonstrated internal-generation behavior remains intact.

elements.name: Fix in-scope PR failures
elements.documentation: Correct an in-scope handoff failure and return through local verification, internal-agent smoke, and fresh review.

elements.name: Internal-generation PR green
elements.documentation: TASK-6 reaches a green source-PR handoff with the internal OpenWiki agent proven able to choose and author helpful BPMN alongside Markdown.

flows.documentation: The recovered boundary is grounded in the actual internal-agent extension seam before code changes begin.
The confirmed update-message seam is paired with a reliable tool the internal agent can invoke.
The internal agent is taught to use the publication command only when BPMN adds explanatory value.
The generation contract and its command must be available together in installed qq environments.
The coherent implementation unit enters the common verification loop.
Initial implementation and every correction use the same focused mechanical checks.
Observed automated results determine whether real internal-agent generation can begin.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: A failing focused Check requires an in-scope correction.
Every check correction returns through the complete focused suite.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: Green mechanics advance to a real OpenWiki internal-generation run.
The generated files and page are inspected for actual explanatory quality, not mere existence.
The qualitative verdict controls whether the capability is ready for independent review.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: Missing, decorative, inaccurate, or unreadable BPMN requires an in-scope tool or guidance adjustment.
Every behavioral adjustment repeats mechanical checks and the real internal-agent smoke run.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: A useful, verified internal-generation result advances to independent review.
The accountable agent verifies every material review report against the exact Change.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: Confirmed in-scope findings receive the smallest causal correction.
Review corrections are mechanically and behaviorally re-observed before exact-delta review.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: A locally green Change with no confirmed findings can be committed and published.
The published Change must pass its applicable GitHub checks before handoff.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: An in-scope PR failure returns to implementation verification and review.
PR corrections repeat every required local and independent Check before another handoff.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: A green source pull request ends the planned implementation flow.
